title: podman quadlet list --format displays row heading in the output
body:
### Issue Description

@Honny1 helped me to identify that this is a bug:

`podman container list --format '{{.ID}}'` displays containers IDs only, not the heading saying that those are container IDs, e.g.
```
podman container list --format '{{.ID}}'
9b6608316078
```

`podman quadlet list --format '{{.Name}}'` displays both heading and names.
```
podman quadlet list --format '{{.Name}}'
NAME
minimal.container
```

This is both inconsistent and not that useful in case of quadlets. I haven't check other `list` subcommands, as I am not familiar with the command tree.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes
